body: Task: Take the smallest honest core cut toward exact runtime-backed  /  SSE enrichment. Start from the explicit gaps in ; verify whether the existing  identities plus shared read-model contracts are already sufficient. If a minimal shared/core helper is missing, add only that helper; otherwise leave Worker 1 a precise blocker/proof describing why the remaining gap is surface/store composition rather than missing domain truth. Success criteria: one small core diff or one explicit blocker note with proof, backed by at least one targeted test or green command, and no broad contract expansion. Relevant files: crates/cairn-domain/src/events.rs, crates/cairn-api/tests/sse_payload_alignment.rs, crates/cairn-runtime/src/services, crates/cairn-store/src/projections.
